rationale: The two papers have direct conceptual overlap: the citing study examines how brand-level price (and advertising) elasticities vary over business-cycle expansions/contractions, while the cited paper specifically studies whether price elasticity varies with GDP growth and documents cyclical heterogeneity across categories. Given this close alignment in core constructs and research question (business cycle ↔ price elasticity cyclicality), this citation is plausibly substantive rather than an incidental mention.
